Title: Sorotta zo Doragon Bôru! Pikkoro-san mo ikikaeru
Writer: Akira Toriyama, Aya Matsui, Takao Koyama
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Kuririn, Son Gohan, and Buruma find the 6th Dragon Ball in an ice cave, and they must escape before the cave collapses. They also search for the final Dragon Ball. Meanwhile, Vegeta stews over his defeat, and he looks for Freeza. ...
